title: Software Engineer, Developer Relations, India
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Vultr is on a mission to make high\\-performance cloud infrastructure easy to use, affordable, and locally accessible for enterprises and AI innovators around the world. With 33 global cloud data center locations, Vultr is trusted by hundreds of thousands of active customers across 185 countries for its flexible, scalable, global Cloud Compute, Cloud GPU, Bare Metal, and Cloud Storage solutions. In December 2024 Vultr announced an equity financing at a $3\\.5 billion valuation. Founded by David Aninowsky and self\\-funded for over a decade, Vultr has grown to become the world’s largest privately\\-held cloud infrastructure company.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Vultr is on a mission to make high\\-performance cloud infrastructure easy to use, affordable, and locally accessible for enterprises and AI innovators around the world. With 32 cloud data center locations around the world, Vultr is trusted by hundreds of thousands of active customers across 185 countries for its flexible, scalable, global Cloud Compute, Cloud GPU, Bare Metal, and Cloud Storage solutions. Founded by David Aninowsky and self\\-funded for over a decade, Vultr has grown to become the world’s largest privately\\-held cloud infrastructure company.
   

  

**Vultr Cares**
* Medical Insurance stipend paid annually
* Professional Development Reimbursement
* 9 Company\\-Paid Holidays
* Generous Leave Policy \\+ 1 month paid sabbatical every 5 years \\+ Anniversary Bonus each year
* First year remote office setup \\+ reimbursement per quarter each subsequent year for new equipment
* Internet reimbursement
* Fitness membership reimbursement
* Company paid Wellable subscription


**Join Vultr**
 Vultr is seeking a highly skilled and experienced Software Engineer, Developer Relations to enhance our developer community experience through innovative web applications and comprehensive documentation. The ideal candidate is a versatile developer with strong technical writing skills who can bridge the gap between complex cloud infrastructure and practical developer resources. This is a highly visible role in a high\\-growth technology company, which will require hands\\-on web development, meticulous documentation practices, and a passion for empowering developers. This is your opportunity to join our fast growing team and leave your mark on Vultr and the future of Cloud Infrastructure.
   

  

**What to expect:**
* Develop new web applications using Next.js, FastAPI, and Flask for developer community initiatives.
* Maintain existing DevRel applications with Docker and Kubernetes deployments.
* Create technical documentation for Vultr Docs including APIs and tutorials.
* Document development workflows and maintenance procedures.
* Collaborate with engineering teams to gather requirements and deliver solutions.
* Engage with developer community to understand needs and incorporate feedback.
* Work in a fast\\-paced environment impacting thousands of developers.


**Our new team member will need:**
* Strong web development skills with Next.js and modern JavaScript frameworks.
* Experience with FastAPI and Flask for backend development.
* Proficiency with containerization using Docker and Kubernetes orchestration.
* Excellent technical writing and documentation abilities.
* Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear, developer\\-friendly content.
* Self\\-motivated approach to managing multiple projects and deadlines.
* Collaborative mindset for working with cross\\-functional teams.
* Passion for developer experience and community engagement.


**Experience**
 Candidate with 3 \\- 4 Years of relevant experience are preferred.
   

  

**Inclusion \\& Privacy**
 We are an equal opportunity employer and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds and experiences, and we prohibit discrimination based on race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected status under applicable laws. Vultr will consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records in accordance with applicable laws and will not conduct a background check until after an offer of employment has been extended and accepted.
   

  

 We also take your privacy seriously. We handle personal information responsibly and follow applicable laws, including U.S. privacy rules and India’s Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023\\. Your data is used only for legitimate business purposes and is protected with proper security measures.
   

  

 Where allowed by law, applicants may request details about the data we collect, access or delete their information, withdraw consent for its use, and opt out of nonessential communications. For more details, please see our Privacy Policy.

title: Fullstack Engineer

title: ML Ops Platform Engineer
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Role:**
 We are seeking a skilled MLOps Platform Engineer to build and maintain a robust platform for the entire Machine Learning (ML) lifecycle. This role involves automating ML model training, testing, deployment, and monitoring, integrating seamlessly with our existing infrastructure to accelerate ML innovation.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* CI/CD for ML: Develop and manage CI/CD pipelines for ML model code and infrastructure, covering unit, integration, and deployment to all environments.
* Automated ML Training: Design and implement pipelines for repeatable model training, automatic sweeps, data processing, and hyperparameter optimization.
+ Include scheduling, queuing, and cost monitoring for training runs.
+ Support training on cloud and on\\-premise GPU resources.

* Model Monitoring: Establish tools and dashboards for continuous monitoring of deployed ML models, ensuring health, availability, and performance.
* Platform Integration: Ensure the MLOps platform integrates with company workflows, data pipelines, and computing architecture.
* MLOps Best Practices: Promote and implement best practices for reproducibility, version control, and governance across the ML lifecycle.


**Technical Skills**
* Strong experience MLOps, DevOps, or ML Engineering, focusing on ML infrastructure
* Programming: Strong proficiency in Python and ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit\\-learn).
* CI/CD \\& Orchestration: Experience with CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions) and workflow orchestrators (e.g., Airflow).
* Model Serving \\& Deployment: Design and implement strategies for deploying ML models to production on Kubernetes, leveraging frameworks like BentoML or MLServer for efficient and scalable model serving.
* Cloud: Hands\\-on experience with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and its ML services.
* MLOps Tools: Familiarity with MLOps platforms like Comet ML, MLflow, Kubeflow, SageMaker, or Vertex AI.
* Monitoring: Experience with ML model monitoring solutions.
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools (e.g., Terraform).
* Knowledge of distributed training frameworks.
* Hands\\-On experience in Databricks \\& Data engineering. (PySpark is must or SQL/PostgreSQL/MySQL, NoSQL)


**Job Description \\- Grade Specific**
 Has more than five year of relevant work experience. Solid understanding of programming concepts, software design and software development principles. Consistently works to direction with minimal supervision, producing accurate and reliable results. Individuals are expected to be able to work on a range of tasks and problems, demonstrating their ability to apply their skills and knowledge. Organises own time to deliver against tasks set by others with a mid term horizon. Works co\\-operatively with others to achieve team goals and has a direct and positive impact on project performance and make decisions based on their understanding of the situation, not just the rules.
   

  

 Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55\\-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end\\-to\\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Customer Application Engineer, Senior 1 (Dot Net)
description:
We are Progress (Nasdaq: PRGS) \\- a trusted provider of software that enables our customers to develop, deploy and manage responsible, AI powered applications and experiences with agility and ease.
   

  

 We’re proud to have a diverse, global team where we value the individual and enrich our culture by considering varied perspectives because we believe people power progress. Join us as a Customer Application Engineer and help us do what we do best: propelling business forward. Know more about us.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a passionate Customer Application Engineer to join our team and help customers successfully build and manage digital experiences using Progress Sitefinity, a leading digital experience platform.
   

  

 You will work directly with enterprise customers to troubleshoot complex technical issues, analyze application behavior, and deliver effective solutions. You will collaborate closely with product and engineering teams to investigate product behavior, identify root causes, and ensure customers get the most value from the platform.
   

  

 You will work across a modern technology stack including C\\#, ASP.NET, SQL Server, web technologies, and cloud platforms. Customer environments may include applications hosted on Microsoft Internet Information Services (IIS) as well as cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure.
   

  

 This role is ideal for someone who enjoys deep technical troubleshooting, solving challenging problems, and working closely with customers to deliver impactful solutions.
   

  

**In This Role You Will**
* Provide technical support for customers using Progress Sitefinity, troubleshooting platform configuration, application behavior, and product\\-related issues.
* Investigate complex technical problems involving C\\#, ASP.NET, web technologies, and integrations.
* Debug application issues using tools such as Visual Studio, log analysis, and stack trace investigation.
* Troubleshoot deployments and configuration issues on Microsoft Internet Information Services (IIS).
* Diagnose database\\-related problems using Microsoft SQL Server, including query troubleshooting and performance analysis.
* Reproduce customer\\-reported issues in internal environments to determine root causes and validate solutions.
* Collaborate with engineering teams to escalate product defects and provide detailed technical analysis.
* Assist customers with integrations involving REST APIs, third\\-party services, and custom implementations.
* Provide guidance on best practices for configuring, deploying, and optimizing Sitefinity implementations.
* Support customer environments operating within SaaS and PaaS architectures, including cloud deployments.
* Manage and prioritize multiple technical cases while maintaining strong customer communication.
* Contribute to internal knowledge bases by documenting troubleshooting steps and solutions.


**Your Background**
* Strong experience with C\\# and ASP.NET / ASP.NET MVC.
* Solid understanding of web technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and browser debugging tools.
* Strong knowledge of SQL and relational databases, preferably Microsoft SQL Server.
* Experience troubleshooting applications hosted on Microsoft Internet Information Services (IIS).
* Familiarity with debugging and development tools such as Visual Studio.
* Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills with the ability to perform root cause analysis.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills with a strong customer focus.


**Nice to Have**
* Experience working with Progress Sitefinity or other enterprise CMS platforms.
* Exposure to cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure.
* Familiarity with SaaS and PaaS deployment models.
* Experience with REST APIs, integrations, and system interoperability.
* Exposure to DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, or version control systems such as Git.
* Knowledge of application performance monitoring and troubleshooting tools.
* What You’ll Gain in This Role
* In this role, you will have the opportunity to:
* Develop deep expertise in enterprise digital experience platforms such as Progress Sitefinity.
* Work on complex technical scenarios involving enterprise\\-scale web applications and integrations.
* Strengthen your expertise in .NET technologies, debugging techniques, and application architecture.
* Gain exposure to cloud deployments and modern infrastructure, including Microsoft Azure.
* Collaborate closely with engineering and product teams, contributing to product improvements and technical insights.
* Build strong experience supporting enterprise customer environments and modern SaaS/PaaS ecosystems.


**Shift Timing:** 
 This role supports APAC customers, and the selected candidate will work a fixed shift from
 **5:00 AM – 2:00 PM IST.**
**Compensation**
**If this sounds like you and fits your experience and career goals, we’d be happy to chat. What we offer in return is the opportunity to experience a great company culture with wonderful colleagues to learn from and collaborate with and also to enjoy:**
* Competitive remuneration package
* Employee Stock Purchase Plan Enrolment


**Vacation, Family, and Health**
* 30 days of earned leave
* An extra day off for your birthday
* Various other leaves like marriage leave, casual leave, maternity, and paternity leave
* Premium Group Medical Insurance for employees and five dependents, personal accident insurance coverage, life insurance coverage
* Professional development reimbursement
* Interest subsidy on loans \\- either vehicle or personal loans
* Health club reimbursement

 Strong backend engineering background with expertise in building scalable systems using Python, C\\#, Java or similar, and hands\\-on experience with microservices, REST APIs, Kafka, and cloud platforms (AWS/Azure) — preferably with exposure to secure, low\\-latency architectures. title: Operations Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** 
 Operations Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Support the operations and/or manage delivery for production systems and services based on operational requirements and service agreement.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Network Infrastructures, Network Data, Juniper technology
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 7\\.5 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 Responsible for design, deployment, monitoring, and optimization of enterprise WAN, LAN, and WLAN environments using SD\\-WAN (Juniper SSR/SRX) and Juniper Mist AI platform, ensuring high availability, performance, and user experience.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* SD\\-WAN (WAN Domain)


 Design, deploy, and manage SD\\-WAN solutions across branch and data center environments
   

  

 Configure application\\-aware routing, traffic steering, and failover policies
   

  

 Monitor WAN edge health, tunnels, and application performance using telemetry and analytics
   

  

 Troubleshoot WAN issues (latency, packet loss, brownouts, ISP issues) and ensure service continuity
   

  

 Support integration with SASE platforms (Prisma, Zscaler, Secure Edge)
   

  

* Juniper MIST (AIOps \\& Campus)


 Monitor and manage network using Juniper Mist dashboards, SLEs, and Marvis AI insights
   

  

 Perform AI\\-driven proactive troubleshooting and root cause analysis (RCA)
   

  

 Analyze anomalies (Wi\\-Fi, LAN, WAN) and resolve issues before user impact
   

  

 Optimize user experience using SLE metrics (latency, throughput, roaming, client health)
   

  

 Implement configuration changes, RF optimization, and performance tuning
   

  

* Network Operations (VNOC/NOC)


 Perform 24 7 monitoring, alert validation, and incident management
   

  

 Execute proactive issue identification using trends and telemetry
   

  

 Validate service restoration and maintain SLA/KPI compliance
   

  

 Collaborate with L2/L3/OEM/ISP teams for escalations and permanent fixes
   

  

 Maintain incident documentation, RCA, and continuous improvement initiatives
   

  

* Implementation \\& Projects


 Lead or support network deployment, upgrades, and migration projects
   

  

 Configure devices: Juniper SRX, SSR, EX switches, Mist APs
   

  

 Perform integration testing, change execution, and rollout planning
   

  

 Develop LLD, HLD, SOPs, and topology documentation
   

  

* Automation \\& Optimization


 Leverage Mist APIs / automation tools for operational efficiency
   

  

 Use AI insights to reduce MTTR / MTTI and incident volumes
   

  

 Identify opportunities for automation and self\\-healing networks
   

  

* Stakeholder \\& Communication


 Coordinate with clients, vendors, and internal teams
   

  

 Provide technical updates, reports, and service health dashboards
   

  

 Support audits, compliance, and governance processes
   

  

**Required Skills \\& Expertise**
 Technical Skills
   

  

 Strong knowledge of:
   

  

* Routing protocols: BGP, OSPF
* Networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, VLAN, QoS
* SD\\-WAN architecture and deployment


 Hands\\-on with:
   

  

* Juniper Mist AI (Wireless/Wired/WAN Assurance)
* Juniper SRX / SSR / EX / AP platforms


 Experience in:
   

  

* Network troubleshooting \\& diagnostics tools
* Monitoring \\& analytics (telemetry\\-based operations)


 Behavioral Skills
   

  

 Strong problem\\-solving and analytical skills
   

  

 Ability to work in high\\-pressure NOC/VNOC environments
   

  

 Effective communication and stakeholder management
   

  

 Fast learner with adaptability to new technologies
   

  

 Experience \\& Qualification
   

  

 4–10\\+ years in Network Engineering (WAN/LAN/WLAN)
   

  

 Experience in SD\\-WAN (Juniper \\& Cisco)
   

  

**Certifications (Preferred)**
 Juniper MIST (JNCIA\\-Mist / JNCIS\\-Mist)
   

  

 Juniper Routing \\& Switching (JNCIA/JNCIS)
   

  

 SD\\-WAN / CCNP / SASE certifications
   

  

 Key Outcomes / KPIs
   

  

 Improved user experience (SLE\\-driven operations)
   

  

 Reduced MTTR / incident volume
   

  

 High network availability \\& SLA compliance
   

  

 Increased automation and proactive operations maturity
